title: Monitoring Alert Resolved Payload
description: Payload schema for an event that is emitted when a monitoring alert is resolved.

alertId.description: Unique identifier for the alert that resolved.

alertType.description: Canonical type of alert that resolved.

kind.description: Canonical resource kind associated with the alert (e.g., queue, agent-pool, external-service).

id.description: Stable identifier for the monitored resource.

name.description: Display name of the monitored resource.

resource.description: Monitored resource associated with the resolved alert.

name.description: Human-readable name of the condition that triggered the alert.

metric.description: Metric used to evaluate alert condition (e.g., queue-depth, latency-p95-ms, availability-percent).

operator.description: Comparison operator used for threshold evaluation.

threshold.description: Configured threshold for the alert condition.

observed.description: Observed metric value when the alert resolved.

aggregation.description: Optional aggregation method used for the observed metric value (e.g., avg, sum, max, min).

windowMinutes.description: Optional evaluation time window in minutes.

condition.description: Condition that triggered the alert, provided for resolution context.

resolvedTimestamp.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when the alert transitioned to resolved.

openedTimestamp.description: Optional RFC 3339 timestamp when the alert originally opened.

resolutionReason.description: Optional normalized reason the alert transitioned to resolved.

details.description: Provider-specific metadata for alert resolution context and diagnostics.
